---
title: "Blog"
subtitle: "Notes on statistics, art, books, and miscellaneous thoughts."
image: images/belkahia.jpg
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:2em;">
  <img src="images/belkahia.jpg" style="max-width:200px; border-radius:6px; box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);" alt="Blog">
</div>
```
